Class Cart

java.lang.Object
order.Cart
public class Cart extends Object
Class Name: Cart

Description: Cart, array of products and packs the user has not paid yet

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Cart()
    Creates a cart with default modification date (today)
    Cart(boolean expired, LocalDate modificationDate)
    Creates a new cart without content
    Cart(List<StoreProduct> sp, List<Pack> packs, boolean expired, LocalDate modificationDate)
    Creates a new cart

  • Constructor Details

    • Cart

      public Cart(List<StoreProduct> sp, List<Pack> packs, boolean expired, LocalDate modificationDate)
      Creates a new cart
      Parameters:
      sp - , the store products
      packs - , the packs
      expired - , whether it's expired
      modificationDate - , the last modification date

    • Cart

      public Cart(boolean expired, LocalDate modificationDate)
      Creates a new cart without content
      Parameters:
      expired - , whether it's expired
      modificationDate - , the last modification date

    • Cart

      public Cart()
      Creates a cart with default modification date (today)
